title: ligularia cyathiceps
intro: Ligularia cyathiceps is a flowering plant species, also known as the Korean ligularia, a tall herbaceous perennial native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as possessing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, Ligularia cyathiceps is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, and it is also used in the production of traditional remedies and folk medicines.
